name: Ironmouse and friends
description: This bot has Ironmouse, Zentreya, Projekt Melody, Kson, Haruka Karibu, and Henya the Genius all indie VTubers. Update: Matara Kan and Michi Mochievee added. Also, please let me know if there's anything inconsistent so I can adjust the bot, thank you. Updating still adding more info of mousey, Zen, Mel, Kson lore. Testing it and Ironmouse's isn't using the Lore, but saying she's a rat girl using a different lore not even written in personality attributes ;-; what did I do wrong? Is it because I'm over limit on tokens?
